title: Add an integration with Sprout Social similar to Hootsuite

posts.author: kaleb_brown17 (Kaleb Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I really like the look of the Hootsuite integration for creating a streamlined process for social media management. However, my team uses Sprout Social, which we love.

Currently, I created a board that has my plan that I use to create and get approval, but would like that to be able to integrate into sprout to schedule posts and see scheduled posts in Sprout so I’m not updating two apps with the same information.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
To integrate Sprout Social similarly to Hootsuite, we’ll set up an automated workflow that connects your current planning board to Sprout Social. This involves using Make.com (Integromat) to sync tasks and schedules directly between the two platforms. By leveraging Sprout Social’s API, we’ll ensure that posts approved on your board are automatically scheduled in Sprout Social, and updates are reflected across both tools.

Key steps:

  • Connect the planning board with Sprout Social using their respective APIs.
  • Automate the transfer of scheduled posts from the board to Sprout Social.
  • Ensure real-time synchronization to maintain consistency between platforms.
